exp_desc: ML1 legacy flat-router anchor with narrow LR search while varying expert_scale only.
cmd: python3 hyperopt_tune.py --config-name config --max-evals 8 --tune-epochs 40 --tune-patience 5 --seed 2600 --run-group fmoe_v3 --run-axis hparam --run-phase P2ESLR_S1 model=featured_moe_v3_tune dataset=movielens1m eval_mode=session feature_mode=full_v2 gpu_id=0 log_wandb=false enable_tf32=true fmoe_debug_logging=false train_batch_size=3072 eval_batch_size=6144 MAX_ITEM_LIST_LENGTH=10 ++search.MAX_ITEM_LIST_LENGTH=\[10\] embedding_size=128 ++search.embedding_size=\[128\] num_heads=8 ++search.num_heads=\[8\] d_feat_emb=16 ++search.d_feat_emb=\[16\] d_expert_hidden=512 ++search.d_expert_hidden=\[512\] d_router_hidden=64 ++search.d_router_hidden=\[64\] expert_scale=1 ++search.expert_scale=\[1\] fmoe_v2_layout_id=7 ++search.fmoe_v2_layout_id=\[7\] fmoe_stage_execution_mode=serial ++search.fmoe_stage_execution_mode=\[serial\] learning_rate=0.001 +weight_decay=0.0 hidden_dropout_prob=0.1 balance_loss_lambda=0.01 ++search.learning_rate=\[0.0028\,0.0032\,0.0036\,0.0040\,0.0048\] ++search.weight_decay=\[7.057864066167489e-05\] ++search.hidden_dropout_prob=\[0.10\] ++search.balance_loss_lambda=\[0.005\] moe_top_k=0 ++search.moe_top_k=\[0\] moe_top_k_policy=auto ++search.moe_top_k_policy=\[auto\] moe_top_k_ratio=0.5 ++search.moe_top_k_ratio=\[0.5\] fmoe_v2_parallel_stage_gate_top_k=0 ++search.fmoe_v2_parallel_stage_gate_top_k=\[0\] fmoe_v2_parallel_stage_gate_temperature=1.0 ++search.fmoe_v2_parallel_stage_gate_temperature=\[1.0\] fmoe_v2_stage_merge_aux_enable=false ++search.fmoe_v2_stage_merge_aux_enable=\[false\] fmoe_v2_stage_merge_aux_lambda_scale=1.0 ++search.fmoe_v2_stage_merge_aux_lambda_scale=\[1.0\] fmoe_schedule_enable=false ++search.fmoe_schedule_enable=\[false\] alpha_warmup_until=0 ++search.alpha_warmup_until=\[0\] alpha_warmup_start=0.0 ++search.alpha_warmup_start=\[0.0\] alpha_warmup_end=1.0 ++search.alpha_warmup_end=\[1.0\] temperature_warmup_until=0 ++search.temperature_warmup_until=\[0\] mid_router_temperature_start=1.3 ++search.mid_router_temperature_start=\[1.3\] micro_router_temperature_start=1.3 ++search.micro_router_temperature_start=\[1.3\] moe_top_k_start=0 ++search.moe_top_k_start=\[0\] moe_top_k_warmup_until=0 ++search.moe_top_k_warmup_until=\[0\] learning_rate=0.003457647151765668 weight_decay=7.057864066167489e-05 hidden_dropout_prob=0.10 balance_loss_lambda=0.005 router_design=flat_legacy ++search.router_design=\[flat_legacy\] router_use_hidden=true router_use_feature=true router_impl=learned router_group_bias_scale=0.5 ++search.router_group_bias_scale=\[0.5\] router_clone_residual_scale=0.5
